chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2346 of 2022 M/s Humair Associates Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.10780/22 2. For orders on Misc. No.10781/22 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 15.04.2024 None present. -.-.- Since last three dates petitioner’s counsel has not attended this petition and today is fourth date of hearing when he is called absent. There is no intimation either. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
